description: The Body Class describes the contents of a single body within an Actor COMP. The Actor COMP has a list of all its bodies.

members.name: index
members.description: The index of this Body in its Actor COMP (owner).

members.name: owner
members.description: The Actor COMP to which this body belongs.

members.name: rotate
members.description: Get or set the body's rotation in world space.

members.name: translate
members.description: Get or set the body's translation in world space.

members.name: angularVelocity
members.description: Get or set the body's angular velocity.

members.name: linearVelocity
members.description: Get or set the body's linear velocity.

methods.name: applyImpulseForce
methods.description: Applies impulse force to a body in a Bullet simulation. * force - The impulse force to apply to the body. * relPos (Keyword, Optional) - If specified, applies the force at the relative position, otherwise applied at (0,0,0).

methods.name: applyTorque
methods.description: Applies torque to a body in a Bullet simulation. The torque will only be applied for a single frame. *torque - The torque to apply to the body this frame.

methods.name: applyImpulseTorque
methods.description: Applies impulse torque to a body in a Bullet simulation. *torque - The impulse torque to apply to the body.

methods.name: applyForce
methods.description: Applies force to a body in a Bullet simulation. The force will only be applied for a single frame. *force - The force to apply to the body this frame. *relPos (Keyword, Optional) - If specified, applies the force at the relative position, otherwise applied at (0,0,0).

_provenance.fact: scraped from the Body Class wiki page
